name: book-writer-light
description: Context-light book writing workflow with memory-bank continuity.

interface.shortDescription: Book writing with lean context loading
interface.longDescription: Book Writer Light is a context-light fork of kshanxs/book-writer-skill. It keeps the original book-writing studio and memory-bank workflow while using compact task routing for drafting, outlining, revision, continuity checks, and manuscript maintenance.
defaultPrompt: Use $book-writer-light to start a new book project.
Use $book-writer-light to outline my next chapter.
